name: fable-mode-codex
description: Fable Mode for Codex: staged execution, codebase archaeology, contract-based delegation, failable verification, render checks, AI/RAG safety, and proof-backed handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect first, stage complex work, verify with failable checks, and hand off with proof.
interface.longDescription: A model-agnostic operating discipline for Codex and coding agents. It adds a living stage map, proof matrix, hypothesis-driven debugging, rendered-output verification, safe subagent briefs, AI/RAG/tool guardrails, and skeptical final handoff. It improves process, not raw model capability.
defaultPrompt: Use fable-mode for this task. Inspect first, create a stage map, define failable checks, keep a proof matrix, and disclose unverified work.
Use fable-mode hard mode for this repo change. Verify each stage with commands or artifacts and hand off with exact evidence.
Use fable-mode for this generated artifact. Create the real file, render/open it before completion, and name anything not verified.
